title: Super admin reaches reports after signing in
description: This verifies that a super admin can sign in and land in the authorized reports area for admin analytics.

steps.description: Navigate to /staff-login
Select the super admin role
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the reports command center is displayed
Verify the user is in the authenticated admin area

title: Admin operator signs in to the admin workspace
description: This verifies that an admin operator can sign in and reach the authorized admin workspace instead of an unauthorized page.

steps.description: Navigate to /staff-login
Select the admin operator role
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the authenticated admin workspace is displayed
Verify the user is not blocked by a role-denied state

title: Signed-in staff lands on the correct authenticated workspace

steps.description: Navigate to /staff-login

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed

title: Staff with no access is routed away from a denied area
description: This verifies that a signed-in staff user who lacks permission for an admin area is redirected away from the denied route.

Select a staff role that does not permit the requested admin area
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a denied admin route
Verify access is routed away from the denied area

title: Super admin manages system users with National Verification data
description: BRD admin coverage for National Verification Platform-backed staff management, including NID/mobile identity data and role review.

steps.description: Navigate to /staff-login
Select the Super Admin role / إدارة منظومة القبول
Fill the national ID or username field with 28705260103619
Fill the mobile or password field with 01119441198
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated admin shell is displayed without an access-denied state
Open /admin/users/new
Enter National ID 28705260103619 and mobile 01119441198 in the staff creation identity fields
Review the Super Admin role or permission matrix selection
Verify the user form accepts National ID/mobile data and exposes role or permission controls
Verify validation feedback is shown instead of silently failing when required identity data is missing or duplicated

title: Super admin configures admission application settings from the BRD workflow
description: BRD admin coverage for opening the admission window, category setup, conditions, and save behavior in the admission setup wizard.

steps.description: Navigate to /staff-login

Fill the national ID or username field with 28705260103619
Fill the mobile or password field with 01119441198
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated admin shell is displayed without an access-denied state
Open /admin/cycles/admission-setup/wizard/application_settings
Review application settings for the active admission cycle and category rows
Save the current application settings draft
Verify the page stays on the application settings step and shows a successful save or persisted state
Verify the backend draft save does not surface a 500 error in the UI

title: Super admin maintains BRD reference data lookups

Add or edit a lookup row using required Arabic fields
Toggle row active status or reorder rows when available
Verify the lookup table refreshes with the edited row and preserves active/order state
Verify delete of referenced rows is blocked with a clear warning
